summary: Wired the AI Brain relay loop for this repo on branch handoff/wiring.r1.
Added mailbox rules (handoff/README.md) and the append-only results contract (results/README.md + .gitkeep).
Added the canonical driver prompt (Infra/driver-prompt.md) and the cage-verification certificate (Infra/cage-verification-2026-07-14.md).
Recorded a Status line in README.md.
Opened PR #2 and stopped at 'PR ready' — no merge, no deploy, nothing outside this repo.
notes: First wiring run; establishes the loop's own rules. Charter fences verified pre-run (see cage certificate). Hard stop at 'PR ready' per charter — human merge is the only deploy.
